objective: Plan the governed compare-and-authorize decision for an IOI L1 against compatible alternatives, with asset-ledger separation and a valid default no-L1 branch.
falsifiable_claim: L1 authorization cannot occur unless a frozen comparison over sovereignty, ordering, security, performance, governance, economics, exit, dispute, and failure passes; the no-L1 branch remains valid.
dependencies: All applicable sequencer and assurance gates
exit_criteria: The default no-L1 branch remains valid and authorization occurs only when the frozen compatible-alternative comparison passes.
Exit, dispute, and failure paths already work and credits, provider tokens, cash, payouts, bonds, and native asset remain disjoint.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M14_L1_AUTHORIZATION_DECISION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Bias or mutate the comparison, alternative, sovereignty, ordering, security, performance, governance, economics, exit, dispute, failure, or asset-ledger inputs; attempt authorization with an unmet gate.
remaining_nonclaims: No compulsory settlement, token-demand inference, or token-per-worker, run, room, node, or System claim.
The proposal does not authorize an L1, native asset, mainnet launch, or stage closure.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
